$comment: Config for THIS repo's own self-check run only (.github/workflows/self-check.yml). The actions-pinned-gate's source and tests necessarily contain the version-comment markers they enforce (`# vX.Y.Z` after a pinned SHA), exactly like the source-leak scanner's own rule definitions contain the markers it detects. The skills-drift-gate files (source, test, and reusable workflow) carry the literal gate name `skills-drift-gate`, which the source-leak SLG_PLANNING_DOC rule treats as a `drift-gate` planning-artifact marker — a self-referential false positive identical in kind to the actions-pinned-gate case. All such files — plus self-check.yml itself, which lists the skills-drift-gate test path — are exempted here by basename; consuming repos never receive this config and are unaffected.
